title: Banking and insurance for your first weeks
intro: After you arrive, many people open an account and compare health insurance once registration and BSN are underway—don’t leave both until the last minute.

items.reason: Mobile-first Dutch account many expats use while settling paperwork.
Low-cost transfers and balances in EUR while you set up local banking.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you’re in the BSN window.

disclosure: Some links are affiliate links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.
